info.english_meaning: to accept to recieve to obtain to go to protect to kill to hurt to injure to accept to take
info.hindI_arTa: dAna denA jAnA pAlana karanA rakzA karanA mAra qAlanA duKa denA grahaRa karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tryambakE rudraM niravAdayata' (tE0 brA0 168) (paritozya) niHsAritavAn dayatiriha gatyarTaH
'rakzAMsyeva tat svena BAgaDeyena yajYAnniravadayate' (E0 brA0 27) niravadayatiH kiYcid dattvA prakAlanArTa iti zaqguruSizyaH
'ya eka iva vidayase vasu martAya dASuze' (f0 1847) vitarasItyAha
'vi senABirdayamAno vi rADasA' (f0 10231) vidayamAnaH=vitaran atisfjan visfjan amitreBya izUH mitreByaSca rADAMsi dakziRA rAtIrviBajasa ityuktaM Bavati
'navena pUrvaM dayamAnAH syAma' (ni0 4172) ityupadayAkarmA upadayA rakzeti durgaH

participles.neuter: niravadAyayAmbaBUvat, niravadAyayAmbaBUvad, niravadAyayAmAsivat, niravadAyayAmAsivad, niravadAyayAYcakfvat, niravadAyayAYcakfvad
upadAdayAmbaBUvat, upadAdayAmbaBUvad, upadAdayAmAsivat, upadAdayAmAsivad, upadAdayAYcakfvat, upadAdayAYcakfvad
